prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-B10GRGTGP-10-BLCK-9 Product Type: KITCHEN Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 10" Black Rough Textured Finishing Gravity Trap Gold Pan, Double Wall Riffle Description: Used for prospecting and testing of deposits of heavy minerals

The Professional Gold Pan features riffled traps to catch your gold as the lighter material flows out of the pan, a wide textured bottom for efficient separation of your remaining black sands and deep black color to highlight even fine gold in the bottom of your pan.

This light weight but super tough pan is a top-quality gold getter and will hold up to years of prospecting. Search Terms: gold mining equipment kit tools pan supplies pans outdoor activities prospecting camping sifting screen snuffer Features: - Gold prospecting finishing pan with double riffle side wall; Used to find gold flake and gold nuggets - Single piece molded construction from durable, high impact flexible ABS plastic material; will not fade or crack from extended UV light; process more material with lightweight plastic gold pan than traditional metal pans; floats on top of water - Wide texturered bottom for efficient separation of your remaining black sands and deep black color to highlight even fine gold in the bottom of your pan - Professional gold pan for all skill levels - Gold Panning Pan Specifications: Diameter: 10 inches; Color: black; Depth: 2 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10" Black Rough Textured Gravity Trap Gold Pan
